companyNameJapanese: 扶桑化学工業株式会社
description: Manufactures and sells life science and electronic material products. Electronic materials include ultra-high purity colloidal silica and high purity organo silica sol for semiconductor CMP processes.

_metadata.notes: Founded 1952, HQ: Osaka. 930 employees. Key products: ultra-high purity colloidal silica for semiconductor polishing, organic acids for life sciences.
